product: New Lakebase Autoscaling instances now scale to zero by default
tagline: New Lakebase Autoscaling instances now scale to zero by default after 24 hours of inactivity, reducing compute costs for idle projects.
what_it_does: New Lakebase Autoscaling instances now scale to zero by default after 24 hours of inactivity, reducing compute costs for idle projects. To learn more about scale to zero, see Scale to zero. To configure scale to zero, see Configure scale to zero.
why_it_matters: New Lakebase Autoscaling instances now scale to zero by default after 24 hours of inactivity, reducing compute costs for idle projects.
plain_summary: New Lakebase Autoscaling instances now scale to zero by default after 24 hours of inactivity, reducing compute costs for idle projects. To learn more about scale to zero, see Scale to zero.
key_takeaway: New Lakebase Autoscaling instances now scale to zero by default after 24 hours of inactivity, reducing compute costs for idle projects.
